summary: Completed Phase 0.5 backend testing for Roll-as-SSOT Inventory Ownership. Critical reservation lifecycle working perfectly. Backend APIs 95% functional (19/20 tests passed). Frontend testing partially completed due to navigation script issues.

minor_bugs.impact: Dashboard summary endpoint not accessible, but /api/dashboard works fine

testing_incomplete.issue: Frontend testing incomplete due to Playwright navigation script issues
testing_incomplete.status: Partially tested - login and initial navigation working
testing_incomplete.recommendation: Manual testing or corrected Playwright script needed for full UI validation

passed_tests: ✅ Authentication (admin@kainnusantara.id login)
✅ GET /api/inventory/balances - returns balances with owner_entity_id and owner_entity_name
✅ GET /api/inventory/balances?owner_entity_id=ent_ksc - filters correctly by owner
✅ GET /api/inventory/rolls - returns 33 rolls with owner, lot, status, length fields
✅ GET /api/inventory/rolls?owner_entity_id=ent_ksc - filters correctly by owner
✅ GET /api/inventory/rolls?status=available - filters correctly by status (25 available rolls)
✅ GET /api/products/{id}/stock-breakdown - returns ownership_matrix, rolls, balances
✅ Ownership matrix structure correct (owner×warehouse×lot cells with available/reserved/roll_count)
✅ POST /api/inventory/initial-stock - creates roll with owner/lot/grade validation
✅ CRITICAL: Create Sales Order - reserves rolls at roll level (available 485→450, reserved 50→85)
✅ CRITICAL: Roll allocation owner-scoped (allocations.owner_entity_id == order.entity_id)
✅ CRITICAL: Reserved roll length matches order quantity exactly (35.0m)
✅ CRITICAL: Approve Sales Order - commits rolls (reserved 85→50, committed 0→35)
✅ CRITICAL: Cancel Sales Order - releases rolls back to available (485 restored)
✅ CRITICAL: Balance conservation maintained throughout lifecycle (no stock lost/created)
✅ Balance projection consistency - available_qty matches sum of available rolls
✅ GET /api/dashboard - returns metrics with available_qty=3105, reserved_qty=220
✅ Dashboard KPI consistency verified against sum of balances
✅ Frontend: Login successful
✅ Frontend: Initial page load and navigation working

minor_fixes: Fix /api/dashboard/summary endpoint (returns 404, should return summary data like /api/dashboard)
frontend_validation: Complete frontend testing manually or with corrected Playwright script
Verify WMS → Stock tab displays owner column (badge)
Verify WMS → Rolls tab displays roll table with owner/lot/status
Verify Add Stock form has owner/lot/grade fields
Verify Sales POS → ProductDetail shows ownership matrix
Verify Entity Switcher filters inventory by owner
notes: Core Phase 0.5 functionality is working correctly
Roll-level reservation lifecycle is functioning perfectly with balance conservation
